records.summary: Citizen Lab named NSO Group's Pegasus as the spyware behind targeted attacks on journalists, activists, and heads of state in 45+ countries.
Israeli spyware vendor Candiru linked to attacks on journalists + civil society; sanctioned by US Commerce in Nov 2021.
Israeli spyware vendor QuaDream's REIGN tool used to target journalists, opposition figures in 5+ countries.
Predator spyware sold by North Macedonia's Cytrox + Intellexa group; deployed against journalists in Greece, Egypt.
Italian Hacking Team (now Memento Labs) sold spyware to governments documented attacking journalists/activists in 21 countries.
Anglo-German Gamma Group's FinSpy commercial spyware documented in 25+ countries targeting opposition figures.
Citizen Lab + WhatsApp identified Israeli Paragon Solutions' Graphite spyware targeting journalists in Italy + others.
Canadian DPI vendor Sandvine's devices used by Turkey + Egypt to inject malware into HTTP traffic; sold to ProcessUnity 2024.
Blue Coat devices found censoring Internet in Syria, Burma, China; now part of Symantec/Broadcom.
Citizen Lab found TikTok's data-collection broadly comparable to other big social platforms; no obvious covert channel — but flagged its centralized-PRC ownership as a structural risk.
WeChat international-user content surveilled for keyword analysis used to censor PRC accounts; Citizen Lab documented cross-account surveillance.
Zoom's claim of end-to-end encryption was incorrect; meeting keys routed via PRC servers in some calls (since remediated).
